data_description.school_id: The school ID from the VpMobile24 URL

class.title: Select class
class.description: Choose your class from the list.

subjects.title: Select subjects
subjects.description: Choose the subjects to display. Found: {subject_count} subjects.

holidays.title: School holidays (optional)
holidays.description: Select your federal state to automatically detect school holidays.

error.cannot_connect: Connection to VpMobile24 failed. Please check your credentials.

abort.already_configured: This class is already configured for this school.

init.title: VpMobile24 Settings
init.description:
Current class: **{current_class}** · State: **{current_state}**

What would you like to change?

change_class.title: Change class
change_class.description: Enter the new class name. The subject list will be reloaded afterwards.

subjects.title: Select subjects
subjects.description:
Choose the subjects to display. Found: {subject_count} subjects.

Unchecked subjects will be hidden.

change_holidays.title: Federal state for holidays
change_holidays.description: Select your federal state for automatic school holiday detection.

custom_holidays.title: Manual holiday entries
custom_holidays.description:
One entry per line in format:
`Name,YYYY-MM-DD,YYYY-MM-DD`

Example:
Summer holidays,2026-07-04,2026-08-14

error.cannot_connect: Connection to VpMobile24 failed. Please check your credentials.

reconfig_required.title: VpMobile24: Re-setup required
reconfig_required.description:
You are updating from version {version}. Due to new features (school holidays, improved sensors), please **delete and re-add** the VpMobile24 integration once.

1. Go to Settings → Devices & Services
2. Remove VpMobile24
3. Add VpMobile24 again

Your data will not be lost.
